review_metadata.scope: Cover Selector MVP - Web Application (app.py) and Core Pipeline

executive_summary.overall_reliability: MODERATE - Multiple single-points-of-failure and missing error recovery
key_risks: No background thread exception handling in app.py POST /api/process
FFmpeg timeouts hardcoded (10s-30s) with minimal recovery
Session manager file I/O has no corruption recovery or retry logic
Frame cache lacks concurrent access protection (no locking)
Multipart form parser is fragile - single malformed input crashes handler
No health checks, circuit breakers, or graceful degradation strategies
executive_summary.test_coverage: Limited - No explicit error condition tests found for timeout, disk full, or network failures

1_background_job_handling.issue: Synchronous blocking call without thread-based background processing

details.current_state: Pipeline.run() is called directly in POST handler (lines 347-348), blocking until completion

problem_1_no_async_exception_handling.description: Pipeline exceptions bubble directly to HTTP handler
problem_1_no_async_exception_handling.failure_mode: If pipeline.run() throws exception mid-way (e.g., after stage 3 ranking completes, stage 5 fails), client receives 400 error but session state is partially updated in memory
problem_1_no_async_exception_handling.recovery: NONE - No cleanup, no transaction rollback, orphaned intermediate results

problem_2_no_session_transaction.description: create_session() is not called; web/session_manager.py is imported but never instantiated
problem_2_no_session_transaction.failure_mode: If upload succeeds but processing fails, no way to retry or track session state
problem_2_no_session_transaction.impact: No resumable uploads, no progress tracking API endpoints

problem_3_no_timeout_envelope.description: No global timeout wrapping the entire pipeline execution
problem_3_no_timeout_envelope.failure_mode: If pipeline hangs (ffmpeg stuck), client times out at 10 minutes (xhr.timeout=600000), but server process remains hung. Subsequent requests will be blocked.
problem_3_no_timeout_envelope.recommendation: Add signal.alarm() or threading.Timer to interrupt pipeline after (e.g.) 9 minutes

problem_4_temp_file_cleanup_fragile.description: Video temp file cleanup wrapped in bare except clause
problem_4_temp_file_cleanup_fragile.issue: If unlink() fails silently, disk accumulates temp files (~50MB per upload)
problem_4_temp_file_cleanup_fragile.fix: Log cleanup failures, implement periodic cleanup script

1_background_job_handling.test_coverage: ❌ No test for: exception during stage 3-5, ffmpeg hang, disk full during temp write

2_ffmpeg_subprocess_reliability.issue: FFmpeg subprocess calls lack robust error recovery

problem_1_hardcoded_timeout.failure_mode: If ffmpeg hangs on seek (common with corrupted MP4 headers), subprocess.run() kills process after timeout but exception handler creates fallback image
problem_1_hardcoded_timeout.recovery: Fallback to black image (complete_pipeline.py:267-277) - acceptable for single frame, but no retry or user notification

problem_2_no_ffmpeg_install_check.code_location: Multiple files call 'ffmpeg' without pre-flight check
problem_2_no_ffmpeg_install_check.failure_mode: First ffmpeg call raises FileNotFoundError → handled in frame_sampler.py:144-145 with helpful message, but in complete_pipeline.py:256 it's caught as generic CalledProcessError
problem_2_no_ffmpeg_install_check.inconsistency: Different error messages for same failure across pipeline stages

problem_3_stderr_not_logged.code_location: complete_pipeline.py:256 uses capture_output=True but stderr discarded on success
problem_3_stderr_not_logged.failure_mode: ffmpeg warnings (e.g., 'audio codec not found') are silently dropped, making debugging frame extraction issues difficult

problem_4_race_condition_frame_extractio.code_location: complete_pipeline.py:256, parallel_pipeline.py:236 - both use hardcoded frame_id in output filename
problem_4_race_condition_frame_extractio.failure_mode: If two requests process same video in parallel, frame extraction dir collision possible (though temp dirs mitigate)

2_ffmpeg_subprocess_reliability.test_coverage: ❌ No test for: ffmpeg not installed, corrupted video file, ffmpeg timeout, stderr capture

3_frame_cache_resilience.issue: Cache operations lack durability guarantees and concurrent access protection

problem_1_no_file_locking.failure_mode: Two threads extract same frame hash simultaneously → both call put() → second write overwrites first, or partial JSON written to disk
problem_1_no_file_locking.impact: Cache corruption silent, next get() loads invalid JSON, caught and deleted (frame_cache.py:44-50), but causes cache miss penalty

problem_2_disk_full_not_retried.failure_mode: IOError on put() logged as warning but not retried; feature extraction skips caching, future requests re-compute
problem_2_disk_full_not_retried.recovery: None - feature extraction continues, but cache degrades gracefully

problem_3_corrupted_cache_file_auto_dele.behavior: JSONDecodeError triggers automatic cache file deletion
problem_3_corrupted_cache_file_auto_dele.concern: Silent recovery may hide systemic cache corruption (e.g., full disk caused partial writes across 100 files)

problem_4_stat_race_condition.code_location: session_manager.py:85-87 uses glob + stat in loop
problem_4_stat_race_condition.failure_mode: If history file deleted between glob() and stat().st_mtime check, raises FileNotFoundError
problem_4_stat_race_condition.impact: get_history() call crashes, blocking history UI display

3_frame_cache_resilience.test_coverage: ❌ No test for: concurrent cache access (2+ threads same frame), disk full on cache.put(), corrupted JSON file recovery

4_session_manager_file_io.issue: File I/O operations vulnerable to permission errors, corruption, and data loss

problem_1_mkdir_not_atomic.failure_mode: mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True) may fail on second call if parent dir deleted between checks (race condition with external process)
problem_1_mkdir_not_atomic.impact: Session creation raises exception, request fails with 500

problem_2_save_to_history_no_atomic_writ.failure_mode: open('w') then json.dump() - if process crashes mid-write, session JSON is corrupted
problem_2_save_to_history_no_atomic_writ.fix: Use atomic write: write to .tmp, then rename

problem_3_no_permission_error_recovery.code_location: session_manager.py:104-106 catches IOError but logs only
problem_3_no_permission_error_recovery.failure_mode: If ~/.cover_selector_history has permission 400 or parent is unwritable, all sessions silently fail to persist; client sees success but no history saved

problem_4_history_files_not_deleted.failure_mode: User's home dir accumulates 1 JSON file per request → after 1000 uploads, get_history() is O(n) with 1000 file opens
problem_4_history_files_not_deleted.recommendation: Implement rotation: keep only last 100 files, delete rest

problem_5_in_memory_state_not_persisted.code_location: session_manager.py:27 - self.sessions is dict, lost on restart
problem_5_in_memory_state_not_persisted.failure_mode: If web server crashes, all session state lost; clients cannot resume uploads
problem_5_in_memory_state_not_persisted.impact: Not critical for MVP but breaks upgrade path

4_session_manager_file_io.test_coverage: ❌ No test for: permission denied on history dir, disk full on json.dump(), symlink attack, 1000+ history files

5_multipart_form_parsing.issue: Custom multipart parser is fragile, no input validation

failure_mode: If boundary contains ' or no quotes: boundary=----ABC;charset=utf-8 splits to '----ABC;charset' (broken)
If Content-Type malformed: 'multipart/form-data; charset=utf-8' (no boundary=) raises IndexError
If boundary has trailing spaces: boundary=' ----ABC ' (with quotes) → b' ----ABC '  (double spaces in body don't match)

problem_2_no_content_length_limit.code_location: app.py:292 reads entire content_length into memory
problem_2_no_content_length_limit.failure_mode: Client uploads 5GB file → rfile.read(5GB) → Python consumes 5GB RAM → OOM crash
problem_2_no_content_length_limit.fix: Add max upload size check (e.g., 1GB limit)

problem_3_naive_boundary_split.failure_mode: If video file contains byte sequence matching '--boundary', split produces wrong number of parts
problem_3_naive_boundary_split.probability: Low for random boundary, but possible in real videos

problem_4_no_charset_handling.failure_mode: If filename= contains non-UTF8 bytes, subsequent str() conversions may raise UnicodeDecodeError

5_multipart_form_parsing.test_coverage: ❌ No test for: malformed Content-Type, 5GB upload, filename with non-ASCII, video file containing boundary bytes

6_parallel_processing_exception_handling.issue: Thread pool exceptions caught but not always acted upon

problem_1_futures_not_awaited_on_excepti.behavior: If _extract_single_feature() raises exception in worker thread, future.result() raises exception (lines 132)
problem_1_futures_not_awaited_on_excepti.failure_mode: Exception caught and logged (line 140-141), but worker thread was submitted with executor.submit() - thread still exists until ThreadPoolExecutor.__exit__
problem_1_futures_not_awaited_on_excepti.consequence: If all workers crash, completed=0, no features extracted, ranking_results is empty → downstream crash in Stage 4

problem_2_fallback_sequential_can_also_c.failure_mode: If parallel extraction fails, fallback to sequential (line 147-150). But _extract_single_feature() raises exception again (line 86 'raise') → pipeline aborts
problem_2_fallback_sequential_can_also_c.consequence: No meaningful fallback - if parallel fails, sequential also fails

problem_3_no_timeout_on_executor.failure_mode: If one worker thread hangs on scorer.score(), other workers wait for as_completed() but hanged worker never completes → deadlock up to process death

problem_4_as_completed_doesnt_handle_all.issue: as_completed() is not used (should use futures.as_completed())
problem_4_as_completed_doesnt_handle_all.actual_code: for future in as_completed(futures): iterates futures dict keys, NOT as_completed() generator
problem_4_as_completed_doesnt_handle_all.failure_mode: If first future hangs, loop blocks waiting for first key iteration

6_parallel_processing_exception_handling.test_coverage: ❌ No test for: exception in worker thread, all workers crash, worker thread timeout, scorer hangs

7_api_error_responses.issue: Error responses inconsistent, missing input validation

problem_1_download_endpoint_path_travers.failure_mode: Client sends '/download?file=L2V0Yy9wYXNzd2Q=' (base64('/etc/passwd')) → Path('/etc/passwd') → exists() returns True → file read exposed

problem_2_json_response_error_inconsiste.consequence: Client cannot consistently parse error responses

problem_3_no_input_validation_on_json.failure_mode: xhr.responseText may be huge (10MB+ log output) → JSON.parse() hangs browser
problem_3_no_input_validation_on_json.fix: Limit response size, ensure valid JSON shape before sending

problem_4_directory_traversal_in_multipa.code_location: app.py:309 - filename= extracted from multipart but not validated
problem_4_directory_traversal_in_multipa.concern: Not exploited in current code (filename not used), but future feature might fail

7_api_error_responses.test_coverage: ❌ No test for: path traversal /download, huge error response, invalid JSON response, 404 vs 500 consistency

8_health_checks_and_monitoring.issue: No health check endpoints, no metrics, no graceful shutdown

problem_1_no_health_endpoint.use_case: Load balancer cannot health-check service before routing traffic

problem_2_no_graceful_shutdown.behavior: serve_forever() blocks indefinitely; KeyboardInterrupt closes server
problem_2_no_graceful_shutdown.issue: In-flight requests aborted without cleanup; if processing, temp files left orphaned

problem_3_no_metrics.missing: Request count, latency histogram, error rate, FFmpeg timeout count

8_health_checks_and_monitoring.test_coverage: N/A - design limitation, not a bug

CRITICAL: 1. Background job exception handling - No transaction rollback, orphaned state
7. Path traversal vulnerability in /download endpoint - Arbitrary file disclosure
5. Multipart boundary extraction - IndexError on malformed Content-Type
HIGH: 2. FFmpeg subprocess reliability - Hardcoded timeouts, no install check
4. Session manager file I/O - No atomic writes, permission errors silent
5. No Content-Length limit - 5GB upload causes OOM
MEDIUM: 3. Frame cache - No locking, concurrent access corruption
6. Parallel processing - Fallback sequential also raises exception
7. API error response inconsistency - 404 vs 500 JSON format

P0_immediate.title: Fix path traversal in /download endpoint
P0_immediate.solution: Use Path(output_dir) / file_path.name to prevent directory traversal; validate file_path is within output_dir

P0_immediate.title: Add Content-Length limit to multipart parser
P0_immediate.solution: if content_length > MAX_UPLOAD_SIZE: raise ValueError('File too large'); MAX_UPLOAD_SIZE = 1 * 1024**3

P0_immediate.title: Validate Content-Type boundary extraction
P0_immediate.solution: Use email.message.EmailMessage or multipart library instead of string split

P1_high_impact.title: Add async background job handling with exception wrapper
P1_high_impact.solution: Wrap pipeline.run() in try-except, implement session state machine (created → processing → completed/failed), add timeout envelope with signal.alarm()

P1_high_impact.title: Add FFmpeg install pre-flight check
P1_high_impact.solution: Add validate_ffmpeg() in __init__, raise ValueError if not found with installation instructions

P1_high_impact.title: Implement atomic writes for session manager
P1_high_impact.solution: Write to .tmp file, then rename atomically (os.rename)

P1_high_impact.title: Add file locking to frame cache
P1_high_impact.solution: Use fcntl.flock() on Linux / msvcrt.locking() on Windows, or use fasteners.InterProcessLock

P2_medium_impact.title: Fix parallel pipeline exception fallback
P2_medium_impact.solution: Make _extract_single_feature() return (None, None, None) on exception instead of raising; let fallback continue

P2_medium_impact.title: Log FFmpeg stderr for debugging
P2_medium_impact.solution: Capture stderr, log it (not just check return code)
P2_medium_impact.test: assert 'stream not found' in logs when running on corrupted video

P2_medium_impact.title: Add health check endpoint GET /health
P2_medium_impact.solution: Return { status: 'healthy', version: '0.2.0', dependencies: { ffmpeg: true } }

P2_medium_impact.title: Implement session history cleanup (rotation)
P2_medium_impact.solution: Keep last 100 sessions, delete older ones; add .get_history(limit=20, auto_cleanup=True)

P3_nice_to_have.title: Add circuit breaker for FFmpeg failures
P3_nice_to_have.description: If FFmpeg fails 5x in a row, temporarily disable and alert user
P3_nice_to_have.solution: Track FFmpeg error rate, implement exponential backoff

P3_nice_to_have.title: Implement retry logic for temporary failures
P3_nice_to_have.description: Retry frame extraction up to 3x with exponential backoff on timeout
P3_nice_to_have.solution: Wrap ffmpeg call in retry decorator

P3_nice_to_have.title: Add graceful shutdown with request drain
P3_nice_to_have.description: On SIGTERM, stop accepting new requests, wait for in-flight to complete (up to 5 min timeout)
